techcrunch.title: How AI guardrails are impeding the work of offensive cybersecurity researchers
techcrunch.summary: We spoke with several cybersecurity researchers, who look for unknown vulnerabilities and develop tools to exploit them, about how OpenAI’s and Anthropic’s guardrails affect their work.

techcrunch.title: AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack-scale system
techcrunch.summary: AMD is challenging its chipmaker rival with a new rack-scale system that will start shipping to customers later this year.

techcrunch.title: Anthropic updates Claude voice mode with more capable models
techcrunch.summary: Claude's new voice model will let you reschedule your meeting or draft an email.

techcrunch.title: AegisAI, founded by former Google security execs, lands $36M to stop AI-driven spear phishing
techcrunch.summary: AegisAI co-founders developed AI agents that quickly analyze each message as a human would, paying attention to small anomalies that even the most elaborate checklist wouldn’t catch.

techcrunch.title: Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded
techcrunch.summary: The Media Router is a tool that automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model for a request based on whether a developer prioritizes quality, speed or cost.

techcrunch.title: OpenAI makes ChatGPT Health available to all US users
techcrunch.summary: Users can also integrate their personal data from services like Apple Health, Function, and MyFitnessPal.

techcrunch.title: Meta launched a new AI optimism ad set to a song about human extinction
techcrunch.summary: David Bowie's song "Five Years," which Meta used in a supposedly inspiring advertisement, is about humans learning that they have five years left to live before the apocalypse.

techcrunch.title: Nvidia is sending GPUs to the moon
techcrunch.summary: If there's a place in the universe without GPUs, Nvidia is sending them there.

techcrunch.title: AI chip startup Etched defies skeptics, hits $10.3B valuation from big-name investors
techcrunch.summary: Etched, founded by three Harvard dropouts, has created new chips and memory components that speed up inference on any AI model -- no GPUs required, it says.

techcrunch.title: Google’s Gemini nears billion-user milestone
techcrunch.summary: Gemini had over 750 million monthly users in February.
